name: Dcon Products Public Company Limited
summary: Dcon Products Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells construction supplies in Thailand. The company operates through Sales of Construction Supplies, Sales of Real Estate, and Real Estate for Lease segments. It provides pre-stressed planks and piles, cowboy fences, blocks, and fences and retaining walls under the DCON name; and precast floors, concrete posts, and other products. The company is also involved in the sale and lease of real estate properties. Dcon Products Public Company Limited was founded in 1996 and is based in Bangkok, Thailand.
